title: A Refuge For My Soul

sections.label: Intro
lines: (A Gm Dm C)
In my despair, I raise my voice,
A trembling echo, a weary choice,
My soul pours out, a flood unseen,
In shadowed halls, where I have been.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: (A F C Gm)
I cry aloud, to skies so vast,
Unveil my heart, its shadows cast,
The path before me, rugged, torn,
With every step, my spirit worn.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: (Dm Bb F C)
When all forsake, when none can see,
The trap set close, surrounding me,
I lift my eyes, though weighed with strife,
Seeking the light to redeem my life.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (F C Gm Dm)
You are my refuge, my shelter, my song,
In your embrace, I’ve found where I belong,
When the world is silent, my voice is heard,
Through your mercy, I am stirred.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: (A F C Gm)
The walls close in, the night descends,
But in my prayer, the darkness bends,
Your grace a flame, my hope sustains,
Through raging storms and bitter rains.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: (Bb F Dm Gm)
I was alone, the last of the kind,
But in your love, my rest I find,
Lift my soul, like wings unseen,
Guide me to places I’ve never been.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (F C Gm Dm)
You are my refuge, my shelter, my song,
In your embrace, I’ve found where I belong,
When the world is silent, my voice is heard,
Through your mercy, I am stirred.

sections.label: Outro
lines: (A Gm F C)
Through every shadow, your light will stay,
A constant guide through the fleeting day,
I whisper still, through the quiet night,
You are my refuge, my saving light.

epigraph: no man cared for my soul
